description: 2U is an education technology company that partners with universities and companies to deliver online education, and operates the edX learning platform. Its public site describes the company and its edX-powered offerings.
summary: 2u.com exposes a public edX MCP server at `https://xpert-chatgpt-app.prod.ai.2u.com/mcp`; no public HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLIs were found on 2u.com.
